description: Off-canvas mobile navigation toggle button that opens the left slide-out menu.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Menu toggle button in collapsed state as seen on most pages

stories.name: Expanded
stories.description: Menu toggle button in expanded/open state

notes: This element appears on 26,276 pages as the off-canvas mobile menu trigger. The label text 'Menu' and the burger icon span are hardcoded — they never vary across samples. The aria-controls, data-toggle, and data-off-canvas-wrapper attributes all reference the same id 'left-off-canvas-menu' on every page. The .ug-explore-menu selector (413 pages) is a structurally distinct empty <ul class="ug-explore-menu school"> used as a dynamic menu container for UG explore pages — it is not related to this component. The .menu a selector (26,276 pages) refers to anchor links rendered inside the off-canvas panel content, not this toggle button itself.
htmlExamples: Menu
